title: quercus × vilmoriniana
intro: Quercus × vilmoriniana, also known as Vilmorin's oak or hybrid pedunculate oak, is a deciduous tree hybrid that is a cross between the pedunculate oak (Quercus robur) and the English oak (Quercus petraea). The bark and leaves of this plant are used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × vilmoriniana include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
